name: Broccoli Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a skillet, sauté broccoli, scallions, and garlic in oil for 3 minutes. Remove from heat and sprinkle with flour and oregano. Toss to coat the vegetables evenly.
3. Spread the vegetable mixture over the bottom of the pie crust.
4. In a food processor, puree tofu, lemon juice, tahini, nutritional yeast, and soy sauce until smooth. Pour this mixture over the vegetable layer.
5. Sprinkle with wheat germ and paprika.
6. Bake for about 40 minutes or until the center is set. Remove from oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
